edges.n: Waymo robotaxis are hailed exclusively through the Uber app in Austin and Atlanta.
Waymo One is Waymo's own consumer ride-hailing app and service brand.
The Jaguar I-PACE is the workhorse of Waymo's current driverless fleet.
The purpose-built Zeekr RT is Waymo's next-generation robotaxi.
US-built Ioniq 5s join the Waymo fleet under a multi-year supply deal.
Co-operates the Mesa, AZ plant that integrates the Waymo Driver into new robotaxis.
Preliminary alliance to bring Waymo autonomy to personally owned vehicles.
Moove finances and runs Waymo fleet operations and depots in Phoenix and Miami.
Runs Waymo depot operations across Phoenix, SF, LA, Austin and Nashville.
Multi-year fleet-management partnership for San Diego (announced Jun 2026).
Lyft's Flexdrive services and manages Waymo's Nashville fleet.
Nashville: rides hail in the Waymo app; Lyft handles fleet servicing via Flexdrive.
Avis manages Waymo fleet operations in Dallas.
Waymo vehicles deliver Uber Eats orders in Metro Phoenix.
Joint liability-claims research benchmarking Waymo safety against human drivers.
Tokyo taxi app GO manages Waymo's first international testing fleet.
CPUC authorizes Waymo's fared driverless passenger service in California.

edges.b: California Department of Motor Vehicles (California DMV)
edges.n: Holds California driverless testing and deployment permits.
Subject of NHTSA defect evaluations and AV incident-reporting requirements.
Self-certified its purpose-built robotaxi under FMVSS; recall and inquiry dialogue ongoing.

edges.b: California Department of Motor Vehicles (California DMV)
edges.n: Tests driverless in Foster City and San Francisco under DMV permits.

edges.b: Nevada Department of Motor Vehicles (Nevada DMV)
edges.n: Nevada permits underpin Zoox's Las Vegas public robotaxi service.
CPUC pilot permits govern Zoox passenger operations in California.
Toyota JV puts the Pony Driver into bZ4X-based robotaxis for China fleets.
GAC-Toyota lines build Pony.ai's Gen-7 robotaxi vehicles.
Co-developing Gen-7 robotaxis on BAIC's EV platform.
Pony robotaxis ride on the Uber platform in the Middle East.
Singapore robotaxi trial with CDG's Zig app and fleet operations.
RTA pilot program brings Pony robotaxis to Dubai roads.
Cloud infrastructure plus WeChat distribution for robotaxi services.
PonyPilot is Pony.ai's own robotaxi-hailing service.
Hesai LiDAR anchors the sensor suite across Pony robotaxi generations.
European robotaxi collaboration on Stellantis light-commercial vans (announced 2025).
GAC's Ruqi app dispatches Pony robotaxis in Guangzhou.
Hyundai JV; the Ioniq 5 robotaxi was its purpose-built platform.
Piloted autonomous Uber Eats deliveries in Santa Monica.
Ran driverless rides on the Lyft network in Las Vegas before refocusing.
WeRide driverless robotaxis run on Uber in Abu Dhabi, with a 15-city expansion plan.
Apollo Go robotaxis join the Uber platform across Asia and the Middle East.
Momenta L4 vehicles planned on Uber in Europe, starting with Munich (2026).
Strategic investor; partnering toward L4 deployments on the Uber network.
May Mobility AVs serve Uber riders, starting in Arlington, TX.
Autonomous VW ID. Buzz fleet launching on Uber in Los Angeles.
The Nuro Driver powers Uber's premium robotaxi program on Lucid vehicles.
$300M Uber investment; 20k+ Gravity SUVs planned as robotaxis over six years.
Avride robotaxis and sidewalk robots deploy through Uber in Dallas.
Scaling a 100k-vehicle Level-4-ready fleet on NVIDIA DRIVE Hyperion.
Stellantis to supply thousands of AV-ready vans for Uber's robotaxi network.
Dedicated fast-charging depots for Uber EV and AV fleets in NY, LA, SF and Boston.
Uber's in-house depot, charging and operations arm for partner AVs.
Shared network: Eats routes sidewalk robots and robotaxi deliveries.
Uber's logistics arm brokering autonomous truck capacity.
Uber spinout and investor; Serve robots deliver Uber Eats orders.
Multi-market EV supply deal with future autonomy collaboration.
Backed Waabi's $1B raise; Waabi trucks haul on Uber Freight.
ITC authorization enables fully driverless Uber/WeRide operations in Abu Dhabi.
May Mobility autonomous rides are live on Lyft in Atlanta.
Apollo Go robotaxis planned on Lyft/FREE NOW in Germany and the UK.
Mobileye Drive-equipped AVs to join the Lyft network, Dallas first.
Lyft acquired FREE NOW (2025) as its European demand arm.
Flexdrive is Lyft's fleet-management subsidiary.
Wayve AI Driver powers Nissan's next-generation ProPILOT from 2027.
Investor and compute partner behind Wayve's embodied-AI driving stack.
Wayve's productized driver software for OEM and fleet partners.
Via's booking and dispatch software powers May Mobility transit deployments.
MB.OS automated driving runs on NVIDIA DRIVE compute.
Toyota builds next-gen automated driving on DRIVE AGX.
DRIVE Thor plus Continental hardware underpin Aurora's driverless trucks.
The Nuro Driver runs on NVIDIA DRIVE Thor compute.
The Volvo EX90's core computer is NVIDIA DRIVE Orin.
Zeekr ADAS ships on NVIDIA Orin/Thor compute.
The automotive platform arm of NVIDIA.
NVIDIA's simulation and world-model stack for AV development.
SuperVision and Chauffeur programs across Volkswagen Group brands.
Mobileye Drive automates the HOLON urban shuttle.
Mobileye's turnkey Level-4 driver for fleets.
Crowdsourced mapping layer feeding Mobileye autonomy.
VW licenses XPeng's autonomous-driving stack for China-market EVs from 2026.
CARIZON JV develops ADAS on Horizon Journey chips for VW in China.
Momenta powers urban assisted driving for Mercedes China models.
Long-time SAIC autonomy partner across IM Motors lines.
RTA pilot fleet brings Apollo Go robotaxis to Dubai.
The purpose-built RT6 is Apollo Go's sixth-generation robotaxi.

edges.b: Baidu Apollo HD Map / Baidu Maps
edges.n: Baidu's map stack underpins Apollo Go operations.
DiDi's robotaxi R&D arm feeding its ride-hail network.
JV to mass-produce robotaxis on GAC Aion EV platforms.
Geely's ride-hailing arm; robotaxi pilots run on Geely platforms.
GAC-backed robotaxi and ride-hailing platform.
Grab operates WeRide autonomous shuttle routes in Singapore.
Renault vans host WeRide shuttles for European deployments.
ITC authorized fully driverless WeRide robotaxi operations.
WeRide's consumer robotaxi service brand.
LTA sanctions WeRide's public shuttle routes in Singapore.
Geely's premium EV brand supplying robotaxi platforms.
Grab invested in Vay to bring remote driving to Southeast Asian fleets.
The Volvo VNL Autonomous is factory-built for Aurora's driverless lanes.
Autonomy-ready Peterbilt 579s carry the Aurora Driver.
Continental industrializes Aurora's driverless hardware kit at scale.
Aurora hauls commercial freight brokered through Uber Freight.
Driverless Dallas-Houston hauls for Werner.
Autonomous grocery freight for McLane in Texas.
The Waabi Driver was ported to the Volvo VNL without retraining.
Autonomous loads dispatched via Uber Freight.
Majority-owned by Daimler Truck since 2019.
The autonomous-ready Freightliner Cascadia is Torc's launch platform.
Aeva 4D LiDAR is standard on the autonomous Freightliner Cascadia program.
SuperDrive integrates into IVECO S-Way trucks for Europe.
Isuzu invested; co-developing autonomous medium-duty trucks.
Gatik's freight-network-as-a-service brand.
Partnership to productionize autonomous trucks in Japan.
Iris LiDAR ships on the Volvo EX90.
InnovizOne LiDAR enables BMW's Level 3 Personal Pilot.
Falcon LiDAR is standard on Nio's flagship models.
Snapdragon Ride powers BMW's automated-driving stack.
Qualcomm's ADAS and autonomy compute platform.
Completed acquisition of the V2X chipmaker in 2025.
Ouster digital LiDAR guides Serve's sidewalk robots.
Ouster's roadside and intersection perception product line.
In-house FSD computer and training silicon.
Tesla's in-house robotaxi service running FSD.
Supercharger network doubles as the robotaxi charging backbone.
FSD and robotaxi operations are under active NHTSA investigations.
HERE HD Live Map is a certified input to Drive Pilot Level 3.
Valeo SCALA LiDAR enables Drive Pilot's Level 3 certification.
Mercedes' certified Level 3 system and its successor stack.
Foretify verification integrates with DRIVE Sim and Omniverse.
Continental's automotive software subsidiary.
Vehicle-data software shipping in Hyundai and Kia production models.
Commercial arm of the open-source Autoware stack.
Toyota's software and mobility R&D subsidiary.
Thousands of Serve robots fulfill Uber Eats orders across US metros.
Cartken robots deliver for Uber Eats in Miami and Japan.
Coco sidewalk robots are integrated into Uber Eats in LA and Miami.
Multi-market sidewalk delivery on the DoorDash network.
DoorDash Labs' purpose-built autonomous delivery robot.
The Nuro Driver is integrated on the Lucid Gravity for the Uber program.
Licensing brand for Nuro's Level 4 driver.
Ioniq 5 supply deal for Avride's robotaxi fleet.
Oxa's driver software runs Beep's shuttle deployments.
US launch operator for the HOLON urban mover.
Benteler-founded purpose-built shuttle maker.
Toyota-backed; the autonomous Sienna is May's platform.
AI vehicle-inspection lanes rolled out across Hertz locations.
Pony.ai supplies its Gen-7 autonomy stack for Verne's Zagreb robotaxi launch on Arcfox Alpha T5 EVs.
Verne's Zagreb robotaxi rides will be hailed through the Uber app.
MOIA is Volkswagen Group's mobility company and operator of the autonomous ID.Buzz program.
MOIA's autonomous ID.Buzz vehicles carry riders on the Uber platform in Los Angeles.
The ID.Buzz AD program runs Mobileye Drive with a 27-sensor suite.

known.Waymo: First to scale fully driverless ride-hailing: 100M+ rider-only miles across 10+ US metros, with London next.
known.Waymo One: The consumer app for the world's most-used driverless service, 250k+ paid rides a week.
known.Zoox: Built the first purpose-designed robotaxi (no steering wheel) to carry public riders, live in Las Vegas and SF.
known.Pony.ai: First robotaxi operator to reach unit-economics breakeven in a single city (Shenzhen, 2026).
known.Motional: Hyundai-backed robotaxi operator relaunching driverless passenger service in Las Vegas.
known.Uber: The world's largest ride-hail marketplace, now the demand layer for 20+ AV partners.
known.Uber Eats: The most active demand channel for autonomous delivery: Serve, Coco, Cartken, Avride and Waymo.
known.Uber Freight: Logistics marketplace brokering loads onto Aurora and Waabi autonomous trucks.
known.Lyft: North America's #2 rideshare network, becoming a multi-partner AV marketplace.
known.Wayve: Raised the UK's largest AI round for end-to-end learned driving; partnered with Nissan and Uber.
known.Via: Powers microtransit in 650+ cities, the transit software layer for AV shuttles.
known.NVIDIA: The silicon underneath nearly every AV training cluster and many in-car stacks.
known.NVIDIA DRIVE: The de facto compute and software substrate for the AV industry.
known.Mobileye: ADAS technology in 190M+ vehicles, the widest-deployed driving perception fleet on earth.
known.Baidu Apollo Go: The world's largest robotaxi operation by cumulative rides, 11M+ trips across China and beyond.
known.Momenta: China's leading ADAS software exporter, shipping with Mercedes, SAIC and more.
known.XPeng: Vision-based urban assisted driving at scale; VW licenses its stack from 2026.
known.Tesla: Runs the largest vision-only driving fleet: millions of FSD-capable cars feeding one training loop.
known.Tesla Robotaxi / FSD: Launched supervised robotaxi service in Austin (2025), expanding to Miami (2026).
known.Tesla AI Hardware: In-house FSD computer powering the world's largest consumer ADAS fleet.
known.Aurora Innovation: First driverless Class-8 trucks in commercial service on Texas highways.
known.Waabi: Ported its learned driver between truck platforms without retraining; raised $1B.
known.Kodiak AI: First autonomous trucking company to go public; driverless operations in Texas.
known.Torc Robotics: Daimler-owned; targeting series-production driverless Freightliner Cascadias in 2027.
known.Gatik: Pioneered driverless middle-mile box-truck delivery for major retailers.
known.Einride: Operates cab-less electric freight pods in commercial service since 2019.
known.Hesai: The world's highest-volume automotive LiDAR maker.
known.Ouster: Digital LiDAR across automotive, robotics and smart infrastructure; 12,600+ sensors shipped per quarter.
known.Luminar: First to put LiDAR in a global consumer car line (Volvo EX90).
known.Innoviz: LiDAR supplier behind BMW's certified Level 3 Personal Pilot.
known.Valeo: Built the first mass-produced automotive-grade LiDAR (SCALA).
known.Aeva: 4D FMCW LiDAR chosen for Daimler's autonomous Freightliner Cascadia.
known.Applied Intuition: The AV industry's default simulation and validation toolchain, valued above $15B.
known.Scale AI: Labeled much of the industry's training data before Meta's landmark investment.
known.HERE Technologies: The automotive industry's largest independent HD map provider.
known.Qualcomm Automotive: Snapdragon Ride and Digital Chassis: a $45B automotive design-win pipeline.
known.Horizon Robotics: China's top automotive AI-chip maker, 10M+ Journey SoCs shipped.
known.Magna: The West's largest contract vehicle manufacturer, now assembling Waymo's robotaxis.
known.Hyundai Motor Group: Supplies Ioniq 5 platforms to Waymo, Avride and its own Motional JV.
known.Zeekr: Purpose-built the Zeekr RT, Waymo's next-generation robotaxi.
known.Geely: China's most acquisitive automaker; targets 100,000 robotaxis by 2030.
known.BYD: The world's largest EV maker, pushing God's Eye ADAS across its entire lineup.
known.Toyota: The world's #1 automaker: capital and platforms behind Pony.ai, May Mobility and Waymo.
known.Mercedes-Benz Drive Pilot / MB.Drive: First internationally certified Level 3 system sold to consumers.
known.May Mobility: 3.5M+ autonomous rides in city and transit service across the US and Japan.
known.WeRide: First driverless robotaxis in the Gulf; publicly listed and active in 30+ cities.
known.Grab: Southeast Asia's super-app, now operating AV shuttle routes in Singapore.
known.DiDi: China's dominant ride-hailing platform with its own robotaxi arm.
known.Nuro: Won the first federal driverless-vehicle exemption; now licenses the Nuro Driver industry-wide.
known.Serve Robotics: The largest sidewalk-delivery deployment in the US, 2,000 robots for Uber Eats.
known.Swiss Re: Published the first underwriting-grade study showing Waymo beats human-driver claims rates.
known.Transdev: Operates public transit in 17 countries; runs Waymo's depots in five metros.
known.EVgo: One of the largest US fast-charging networks, now building Uber's AV depots.
known.UVeye: AI inspection arches scanning millions of fleet vehicles for operators like Hertz.
known.Vay: First to commercially teledrive cars on US public roads (Las Vegas).
known.NHTSA: The US federal vehicle-safety regulator: writes the FMVSS and runs every AV investigation.
known.California Public Utilities Commission (: Gatekeeper for paid driverless passenger service in California.
known.California Department of Motor Vehicles: Issues California's AV testing and deployment permits.
known.Abu Dhabi ITC: The regulator behind the Gulf's first fully driverless robotaxi service.
known.Dubai RTA: Runs the world's most aggressive city robotaxi procurement: Baidu, Pony and WeRide at once.
Japan's #1 taxi app, managing Waymo's Tokyo fleet.
known.FREE NOW: Europe's leading taxi super-app, acquired by Lyft in 2025.
known.ComfortDelGro Zig: Singapore's biggest taxi operator, now running Pony.ai robotaxi trials.
known.Volvo Trucks / Volvo Autonomous Solution: Factory-builds redundant autonomous VNL trucks for Aurora and Waabi.
known.Continental: Top-three global supplier, industrializing Aurora's driverless truck hardware.
known.Bosch: The world's largest automotive supplier: foundational ADAS sensing and actuation.
known.Holon: Benteler's purpose-built urban shuttle, automated by Mobileye and operated by Beep.
known.Lucid: Its Gravity SUV is the platform for Uber and Nuro's premium robotaxi program.
known.Stellantis: Fourth-largest automaker, supplying AV-ready van platforms to Uber and Pony.ai.
known.Volkswagen Group / CARIAD: Europe's largest automaker, betting on XPeng, Horizon and Mobileye stacks plus its own ID. Buzz AV.
known.Verne: Rimac-born operator behind Europe's first commercial robotaxi launch, Zagreb H2 2026
known.MOIA: VW's autonomous ID.Buzz service, live on Uber in Los Angeles
